name: Collections Ingest — CSV webhook → clean, policy, route (n8n Cloud)

nodes.name: Route · Channel (Internal collections?)
nodes.notes: This tool serves the Internal Collections team. ONLY their channel continues to the app; other channels are worked by external agencies / bureau / AI bot and drop out of scope here. Code twin of this routing: `npm run data:internal`, which writes data/internal_accounts.json.
